title: camissoniopsis cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Camissoniopsis cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa, also known as the coastal cheiranthifolia or scrubland poppy, is a shrubby sub-species of the Camissoniopsis cheiranthifolia plant, a member of the poppy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Camissoniopsis cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa include relief from pain, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Camissoniopsis cheiranthifolia subsp. suffruticosa include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
